title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account by providing a unique email and a password that is at least 8 characters long.

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the email already exists in the system, enforcing the unique email business rule.

title: Account creation with password shorter than 8 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is less than 8 characters, enforcing the minimum password length business rule.

title: Email uniqueness validation before account creation
description: Verify that the system validates email uniqueness before creating the account, preventing duplicate email registration.

title: Password length validation before account creation
description: Verify that the system validates password length (minimum 8 characters) before creating the account.

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters
description: Verify that account creation succeeds when the password is exactly 8 characters long, which is the minimum allowed length.

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is 7 characters long, which is one character below the minimum length.

title: Account creation with password of 9 characters
description: Verify that account creation succeeds when the password is 9 characters long, which is one character above the minimum length.
